basic_details.job_title: HLL Lifecare Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for SSLC Trainees, ITI Trainees Posts
basic_details.short_information: The HLL Lifecare has officially announced the Trainees Recruitment 2026 with openings. The detailed notification was published on its official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 18 to 30 years and hold SSLC/VHSE/Plus 2 Pass or ITI Pass qualification can attend the walk-in interview on 10 July 2026. Direct links to download the notification and application details are shared below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 30 years Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.details: SSLC Trainees: SSLC/VHSE/Plus 2 Pass ITI Trainees: ITI Pass

salary_details.details: SSLC Trainees: Rs. 9000/- (1st year), Rs.10000/- (2nd year), Rs.11500/- (3rd year) ITI Trainees: Rs. 9500/- (1st year), Rs.10500/- (2nd year), Rs.12000/- (3rd year)

_labels.notification_pdf: Download HLL Lifecare Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: HLL Lifecare Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the HLL Lifecare Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download HLL Lifecare Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: SSLC Trainees: SSLC/VHSE/Plus 2 Pass ITI Trainees: ITI Pass

content_sections.heading: HLL Lifecare Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: SSLC Trainees: Rs. 9000/- (1st year), Rs.10000/- (2nd year), Rs.11500/- (3rd year) ITI Trainees: Rs. 9500/- (1st year), Rs.10500/- (2nd year), Rs.12000/- (3rd year)

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for HLL Lifecare Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required. Candidates should report/register before 11 am to attend the test. Attested Photocopies of Certificates, Passport size photo, Aadhaar card (Original & copy) should be produced at the time of walk-in-selection test.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for HLL Lifecare T&D Trainees?
faq.answer: The walk-in selection test date for the T&D Trainees posts at HLL Lifecare is 10th July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance.

faq.question: Q2. What are the eligibility criteria for the T&D Trainees posts?
faq.answer: For SSLC Trainees, candidates need to have passed SSLC/VHSE/Plus 2. For ITI Trainees, an ITI Pass certificate is required. The minimum qualification is 10th pass.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for these trainee positions?
faq.answer: The age limit for the T&D Trainees positions is between 18 to 30 years. Specific age relaxations, if any, are not detailed in the provided information.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the T&D Trainees?
faq.answer: The salary for SSLC Trainees ranges from Rs. 9000/- to Rs. 11500/- per month across three years. For ITI Trainees, the salary ranges from Rs. 9500/- to Rs. 12000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the HLL Lifecare T&D Trainees posts?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the walk-in selection test at the specified venue and time with all required documents.

faq.question: Q6. What documents do I need to carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You need to carry attested photocopies of certificates, a passport-size photo, and your Aadhaar card (original and copy) to the walk-in selection test.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview for HLL Lifecare T&D Trainees being held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at HLL Lifecare, Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, with the pincode 695005.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these training positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Selection Test. Candidates are expected to report and register before 11 am to attend the test.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any specific vacancies mentioned for each post?
faq.answer: The provided data indicates 0 vacancies for both SSLC Trainees and ITI Trainees. It is advisable to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q10. Is there an application fee for the HLL Lifecare T&D Trainees recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for these positions. Candidates should verify this information in the official PDF.

faq.answer: The walk-in selection test date for the T&D Trainees posts at HLL Lifecare is 10th July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance.
